_comment: Copy to hd_rerender.config.json and edit. comfy_root must be the directory containing main.py and the input/, output/, models/ subfolders. organic_model/hardsurface_model are the filenames of .pth files in models/upscale_models/ - omit either to use the validated defaults baked into hd_rerender.py (DAT2 for organic, DevianceMIP for hardsurface). upscale_model is a legacy alias that only feeds hardsurface_model, kept for configs written before per-category routing existed.
